result: If I could change the world in one way, I would want to eliminate poverty and ensure that every human being has their basic needs met - nutritious food, clean water, safe shelter, healthcare, and education. I believe that if everyone had these fundamental needs satisfied, it would lay the groundwork for more equality, opportunity, stability and human flourishing worldwide. People would be freed from the struggle for daily survival and able to reach more of their potential. Of course, achieving this in reality would be incredibly complex and require systemic changes and unprecedented global cooperation. But if I could wave a magic wand, this is the change I would most want to bring about to improve the human condition and build a better world for all.
